15.notes:
If you have any questions call Dominick Downer at C: +1 (425) 515-0295

Free Parking on site. Call site phone to be connected with an officer to escort you inside.

Duties include but are not limited to mainly concierge/front desk security. Including monitoring CCTVs, security email inbox, work orders in Cove, and greeting employees/guests in the lobby. Occasional patrols of the loading dock, interior, and exterior (depending on shift).
15.uniform_notes:
Black AUS polo
Black slacks
Black AUS fleece
Black AUS jacket

[After successfully completing probationary training period, SP will be issued the newly updated BMR-requested corporate security uniform.]
